links.title: Connect & Sync
links.tooltip: Connect your Google account or trigger a re-sync

panels.description: Rule-based conclusions regenerated hourly from the scores below — each sentence maps to one metric. Not medical advice.

targets.query: SELECT last("text") FROM "Insight"

panels.title: Today's read

panels.description: WHOOP-style recovery (0-100) from HRV vs your baseline (60%), resting HR (20%), sleep (15%), respiration (5%). Cold-starts until 4 baseline nights.
panels.title: Recovery

panels.description: Day strain (0-21) from intraday heart rate (Edwards TRIMP). 0 on low-activity days; climbs with time spent at elevated HR.
panels.title: Strain

panels.description: NOOP IllnessSignalEngine: >=2 of RHR up / HRV down / respiration up / skin temp up vs your own baseline. Not a diagnosis. No journal here, so alcohol/travel nights can false-raise.
panels.title: Illness Heads-Up

panels.description: Nes 2011 HUNT model over your 7-day resting HR + activity index — a fitness comparison vs an average peer of your age, not a biological age. ±5y band. Set USER_AGE / USER_SEX in .env.
panels.title: Fitness Age

panels.description: Evening estimate of tomorrow-morning Recovery: 14-night baseline ± strain debt, sleep adequacy, and mean reversion. An estimate, not a measurement.
panels.title: Tomorrow's Recovery (forecast)

panels.description: Rolling ledger of (slept − 8h need). Surplus nights offset deficit ones.
panels.title: Sleep debt (14 nights)

panels.description: Last known values (no scale connected — sourced from your profile).
panels.title: Body

targets.query: SELECT moving_average(mean("value"), 6) FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sleep_type FROM sleep_levels WHERE short = false
SELECT moving_average(mean("value"), 6) FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.description: Resting HR
panels.title: SpO₂ intraday (sleep)

targets.query: select mean_value from (SELECT mean("value") as mean_value FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value <= 96
select mean_value from (SELECT mean("value") as mean_value FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value > 96
select mean_value from (SELECT mean("value") as mean_value FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value < 60
select mean_value from (SELECT mean("value") as mean_value FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1m) fill(null)) where mean_value > 110

panels.description: Active Zone Minutes per day from Google Health API (Fitbit's modern activity metric). Fat Burn = 1x, Cardio & Peak = 2x.
panels.title: Active Zone Minutes

panels.description: WHOOP-style recovery (0-100) from HRV vs your baseline (60%), resting HR (20%), sleep (15%), respiration (5%). Cold-starts until 4 baseline nights.
panels.title: Recovery trend

panels.description: Day strain (0-21) from intraday heart rate (Edwards TRIMP). 0 on low-activity days; climbs with time spent at elevated HR.
panels.title: Strain trend

panels.description: Down = getting fitter. Driven by 7-day resting HR + activity.
panels.title: Fitness Age trend

panels.description: Each forecast point was made the evening before — how predictable are you?
panels.title: Recovery: forecast vs actual

panels.description: Sum of (slept - 8h need) over the last 14 usable nights. Surplus nights genuinely offset deficit ones.
panels.title: Sleep debt (14-night ledger)

panels.description: Resting HR
panels.title: Resting HR

panels.description: Resting HR
panels.title: HRV

panels.description: Device-reported cardio fitness (ml/kg/min). Fills in as the Air reports it.
panels.title: VO₂max (cardio fitness)

panels.description: Resting HR
panels.title: SpO₂ nightly avg

panels.description: Resting HR
panels.title: Breathing Rate

panels.description: Nightly deviation vs your 30-day baseline. One of the four illness-watch signals — sustained rises pair with RHR↑/HRV↓.
panels.title: Skin temp deviation

targets.query: SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT distinct("minutes_deep") FROM "sleep" WHERE is_main_sleep = true AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT median("level") FROM "Sleep Levels" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h)
SELECT sum("value") FROM "Steps" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d, ) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("value"), 6) FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("value"), 6) FROM "HeartRate_Intraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean(value) FROM "heartrate" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(2m) fill(0)
SELECT "ActivityName" AS "Activity", "duration" AS "Duration", "calories" AS "Calories", "distance" AS "Distance" FROM "Activity Records" WHERE $timeFilter ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 25
